hotels.name: Rameez Zostel
hotels.description_fr:
L’établissement Rameez Zostel comprend des hébergements à Puttalam. Vous profiterez d'une cuisine commune et d'une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l'ensemble des locaux.

L'aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport international Bandaranaike) est à 101 km.

Les distances indiquées dans la description de l'établissement sont calculées avec © OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodation: Rameez Zostel in Puttalam offers a hostel experience with free WiFi and a shared kitchen. Guests can enjoy air-conditioning, spa baths, and private bathrooms.
Modern Amenities: Each room features a bath or shower, tea and coffee maker, hairdryer, work desk, and TV. Additional amenities include a microwave, electric kettle, and wardrobe.
Convenient Location: Located 101 km from Bandaranaike International Airport, the hostel provides free on-site parking. Reception staff speak English.
Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Rameez Zostel ofrece alojamiento en Puttalam. El alojamiento dispone de cocina compartida y wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento.

El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto internacional de Bandaranayake) está a 101 km.

Las distancias en la descripción del alojamiento se calculan con OpenStreetMap©
hotels.description_pt:
Rameez Zostel fornece acomodações em Puttalam. O alojamento apresenta uma cozinha partilhada e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade.

O Aeroporto Internacional de Bandaranaike fica a 101 km da propriedade.

A distância mencionada na descrição do alojamento é calculada com o © OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_it:
Rameez Zostel prevede alloggi a Puttalam. L'alloggio propone una cucina in comune e il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura.

Aeroporto Internazionale di Colombo Bandaranaike si trova a 101 km dalla struttura.

Le distanze nella descrizione della struttura sono calcolate con © OpenStreetMap

hotels.name: The Coconut Experience Eco Lodge Wilpattu
hotels.description_fr:
Proposant un jardin et une terrasse, l’établissement The Coconut Experience Eco Lodge Wilpattu dispose également d’une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite.
Vous bénéficierez d’une salle de bains privative entièrement équipée avec une douche et des articles de toilette gratuits.
Un petit-déjeuner continental, anglais/irlandais complet et asiatique est servi sur place. Sur place, vous pourrez profiter d’un restaurant qui propose de nombreux plats chinois, plats italiens et fruits de mer, ainsi que des options végétariennes et sans lactose.
Vous pourrez jouer aux fléchettes sur place, et pratiquer le vélo dans les environs.
L’établissement se situe à 125 km de l’aéroport le plus proche (Aéroport international Bandaranaike) et propose un service de navette aéroport payant.
hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: The Coconut Experience Eco Lodge Wilpattu in Nagamadu offers a sun terrace, lush garden, and a family-friendly restaurant. Guests enjoy free WiFi, private check-in and check-out, and a 24-hour front desk.
Comfortable Amenities: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms, balconies with lake or garden views, and modern amenities such as tea and coffee makers and free toiletries. Additional facilities include an outdoor play area, picnic spots, and free on-site parking.
Dining Experience: The restaurant serves a variety of cuisines including Chinese, Italian, seafood, local, and international. Breakfast options include continental, full English/Irish, vegetarian, and Asian. Dining ambience ranges from traditional to modern and romantic.
hotels.description_es:
The Coconut Experience Eco Lodge Wilpattu tiene vistas al lago y está en Nagamadu. Cuenta con restaurante, recepción 24 horas, cafetería, jardín y terraza. En el lodge, tanto el wifi como el parking privado son gratis.
Todas las unidades tienen baño privado totalmente equipado con ducha y artículos de aseo gratuitos.
En el alojamiento se puede disfrutar de un desayuno continental, inglés/irlandés completo o asiático.
En The Coconut Experience Eco Lodge Wilpattu, la clientela puede jugar a los dardos en el propio alojamiento o practicar ciclismo en los alrededores.
El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto internacional de Bandaranayake) está a 125 km, y el alojamiento ofrece servicio de traslado de pago para ir o volver del aeropuerto.
hotels.description_pt:
O acesso Wi-Fi e o estacionamento privado estão disponíveis gratuitamente em The Coconut Experience Eco Lodge Wilpattu.
Existe uma casa de banho privativa totalmente equipada com chuveiro e produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos.
O alojamento disponibiliza opções de pequeno-almoço continental, inglês/irlandês completo ou asiático. Em The Coconut Experience Eco Lodge Wilpattu vai encontrar um restaurante que serve gastronomia chinesa, italiano e marisco. Além disso, há também a possibilidade de solicitar opções vegetariano e sem laticínios.
The Coconut Experience Eco Lodge Wilpattu disponibiliza um jardim e um terraço.
hotels.description_it:
Nella città di Nagamadu, The Coconut Experience Eco Lodge Wilpattu propone un giardino con una terrazza e alloggi dotati di WiFi gratuito e aria condizionata. C’è un parcheggio privato disponibile sul posto.
Troverete un bagno privato completo di doccia e set di cortesia.
Presso la struttura potrete gustare una colazione continentale, inglese/irlandese o asiatica. Presso questo lodge troverete un ristorante che serve piatti cinesi, piatti italiani e piatti di pesce. Su richiesta sono disponibili anche opzioni vegetariane e senza latticini.
Durante il vostro soggiorno presso The Coconut Experience Eco Lodge Wilpattu potrete giocare a freccette in loco, oppure praticare il ciclismo nei dintorni.

hotels.name: Bar Reef Resort
hotels.description_fr:
We are thrilled to announce that Bar Reef Resort will officially reopen its doors on 01st December 2025!
After a period of rest and rejuvenation, we are ready to welcome you back to the natural beauty, tranquility, and unmatched hospitality that you know and love. Whether you're returning for the serenity of our beachfront villas or discovering us for the first time, we can't wait to share the magic of Bar Reef with you once again.
📅 Bookings open soon – stay tuned for special reopening offers and updates!
Thank you for your continued support, and we look forward to seeing you in paradise.
Stretched over 2 km of private sandy beach, Bar Reef Resort in Kalpitiya offers rustic yet charming accommodation surrounded by landscaped gardens.
